message.content:
Fix dark theme issues in two React/TypeScript modules at /var/www/cortexbuild-ultimate/src/components/modules/Meetings.tsx and /var/www/cortexbuild-ultimate/src/components/modules/Materials.tsx.

The app uses a dark theme. Both files have light-theme Tailwind classes that break the dark theme.

Apply these replacements throughout BOTH files:
- `bg-white` → `bg-gray-900`
- `bg-gray-50` → `bg-gray-900`
- `bg-gray-100` → `bg-gray-800`
- `border-gray-200` → `border-gray-700`
- `border-gray-300` → `border-gray-700`
- `text-gray-900` → `text-white`
- `text-gray-800` → `text-gray-100`
- `text-gray-700` → `text-gray-300`
- `focus:ring-blue-500` → `focus:ring-orange-500`
- `focus:border-blue-500` → `focus:border-orange-500`

Also fix any input/select/textarea elements that use light-themed styling — they should use `bg-gray-800 border-gray-700 text-white placeholder-gray-500`.

Read each file fully before editing. Make surgical edits using the Edit tool. Do not change any logic, only CSS classes. After editing both files, verify no `bg-white`, `bg-gray-50`, `bg-gray-100`, `border-gray-200`, `border-gray-300`, `text-gray-900`, `text-gray-800`, `text-gray-700` remain.

content.text: I'll read both files fully before making any edits.
Now I have a full picture of both files. I'll apply all the replacements systematically. Starting with Meetings.tsx:

content.text:
Zero matches in both files. All light-theme classes have been replaced.

Here is a summary of every change made:

**Both files — identical pattern of changes:**

- Page headings: `text-gray-900` → `text-white`
- KPI cards: `bg-white border-gray-200` → `bg-gray-900 border-gray-700`; KPI values `text-gray-900` → `text-white`
- Tab bar border: `border-gray-200` → `border-gray-700`; inactive tab hover `hover:text-gray-700` → `hover:text-gray-300`; count badges `bg-gray-100 text-gray-600` → `bg-gray-800 text-gray-300`
- Filter bar: `bg-white border-gray-200` → `bg-gray-900 border-gray-700`; search input and selects given `bg-gray-800 border-gray-700 text-white placeholder-gray-500`
- List/table containers: `bg-white border-gray-200` → `bg-gray-900 border-gray-700`; dividers `divide-gray-100` → `divide-gray-700`; row hover `hover:bg-gray-50` → `hover:bg-gray-800`
- Table thead: `bg-gray-50 border-gray-200` → `bg-gray-800 border-gray-700`
- Table cell text: `text-gray-900` → `text-white`, `text-gray-700/text-gray-800` → `text-gray-300`
- Expanded detail panel: `bg-gray-50` → `bg-gray-900`; body text `text-gray-700` → `text-gray-300`
- Modal shell: `bg-white` → `bg-gray-900`; header border added `border-gray-700`; sticky header `bg-white` → `bg-gray-900`; close button hover `hover:bg-gray-100` → `hover:bg-gray-800`
- Modal form labels: `text-gray-700` → `text-gray-300`
- Modal inputs/selects/textareas: added `bg-gray-800 border-gray-700 text-white placeholder-gray-500`
- Modal Cancel button: `border-gray-200 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50` → `border-gray-700 text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-800`
- `statusColour` badge maps: grey variants updated from `bg-gray-100` to `bg-gray-800` with matching text adjustments
